content:
# playwright-trace-screenshot-debugging - Overview

Automation type: verification_debugging
Tooling: Playwright
Goal: Capture useful evidence and debug data when browser automation succeeds or fails.
Evidence: official / high
Source: https://playwright.dev/docs/best-practices

When to use:
- Automation task needs proof
- A step failed
- Need to inspect console/network
- CI/local discrepancy

Inputs required:
- Expected result
- Failure point
- Browser context/page

AI summary: Automation reports should include screenshots/assertions, current URL/title, console/page errors when relevant, and trace/log references for failures.

# playwright-trace-screenshot-debugging - Execution Steps

Automation type: verification_debugging
Tooling: Playwright
Goal: Capture useful evidence and debug data when browser automation succeeds or fails.
Evidence: official / high
Source: https://playwright.dev/docs/best-practices

- Take screenshots at major milestones and on failure.
- Capture console errors and page errors when debugging.
- Use Playwright trace viewer for deep failures instead of relying only on screenshots.
- Log current URL, title, visible state, and key selector statuses.

AI summary: Automation reports should include screenshots/assertions, current URL/title, console/page errors when relevant, and trace/log references for failures.

# playwright-trace-screenshot-debugging - Commands or APIs

Automation type: verification_debugging
Tooling: Playwright
Goal: Capture useful evidence and debug data when browser automation succeeds or fails.
Evidence: official / high
Source: https://playwright.dev/docs/best-practices

- page.screenshot(...) / locator.screenshot(...)
- page.on('console', ...)
- page.on('pageerror', ...)
- trace viewer

AI summary: Automation reports should include screenshots/assertions, current URL/title, console/page errors when relevant, and trace/log references for failures.

# playwright-trace-screenshot-debugging - Verification

Automation type: verification_debugging
Tooling: Playwright
Goal: Capture useful evidence and debug data when browser automation succeeds or fails.
Evidence: official / high
Source: https://playwright.dev/docs/best-practices

- Screenshot shows final state
- Console errors reviewed
- Trace or log path reported if captured

AI summary: Automation reports should include screenshots/assertions, current URL/title, console/page errors when relevant, and trace/log references for failures.

# playwright-trace-screenshot-debugging - Failure Modes

Automation type: verification_debugging
Tooling: Playwright
Goal: Capture useful evidence and debug data when browser automation succeeds or fails.
Evidence: official / high
Source: https://playwright.dev/docs/best-practices

- Screenshot taken too early
- Console errors ignored
- Trace not enabled
- Final state not asserted

AI summary: Automation reports should include screenshots/assertions, current URL/title, console/page errors when relevant, and trace/log references for failures.

# playwright-trace-screenshot-debugging - Safety Notes

Automation type: verification_debugging
Tooling: Playwright
Goal: Capture useful evidence and debug data when browser automation succeeds or fails.
Evidence: official / high
Source: https://playwright.dev/docs/best-practices

- Do not include secrets/tokens in screenshots or logs if avoidable.

AI summary: Automation reports should include screenshots/assertions, current URL/title, console/page errors when relevant, and trace/log references for failures.

# playwright-trace-screenshot-debugging - Handoff Report

Automation type: verification_debugging
Tooling: Playwright
Goal: Capture useful evidence and debug data when browser automation succeeds or fails.
Evidence: official / high
Source: https://playwright.dev/docs/best-practices

- Screenshots
- Console/page errors
- Current URL/title
- Assertions
- Known gaps

AI summary: Automation reports should include screenshots/assertions, current URL/title, console/page errors when relevant, and trace/log references for failures.
